title: 7 Sending BPRP Service Requests
body_text:
7	Sending BPRP Service Requests
7.1	Sending BPRP Service Requests
Send all BPRP service requests (enrollment, CCIN modifications, and cancellations) as follows:
Non-Central 1 financial institutions
ГўВҖВ“ Send the BPRP request and all supporting documents to your provincial central. Refer to your provincial central for further instructions.
BC and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 clients
ГўВҖВ“ Send the BPRP request and all supporting documents to Central 1 via ServiceNow as instructed below.
Note:	If ServiceNow is unavailable, fax BPRP service requests, along with supporting documentation, to Central 1. See Section 1.3, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
To create a BPRP service request to Central 1 on ServiceNow:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: ServiceNow ГўВҖВ“ Accessing the Service Catalogue
Select
Make a Request
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Selecting Make a Request
Complete the request form and select
Submit
. See Figure 6. The following fields are mandatory:
ГўВҲВ’
Short Description
ГўВҖВ“ Include a brief description of the service request, and the name of the Corporate CreditorГўВҖВҷs business, e.g., BPRP Enrolment ГўВҖВ“ JoeГўВҖВҷs Cleaning.
ГўВҲВ’
Detailed Description
ГўВҖВ“ Be as detailed as possible.
Figure 6: Completing the ServiceNow Request Form
Select the ticket number on the confirmation page. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: The Confirmation Screen and Ticket Number
Select the paperclip icon to upload the required documentation to the ticket and follow the prompts. Select
Update
or
Save
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Selecting the Paperclip Icon to Attach Supporting Documents
Related Information
ServiceNow Training Video
END
